<h1 id="heading-1">Steps</h1><h2 id="heading-2"><strong class="my-custom-class">Before you start</strong></h2><p>All further operations will be performed on macOS because the author uses macOS.</p><p>Users in mainland China may encounter many problems, please make sure that your network can smoothly access certain international websites.</p><h3 id="heading-3"><strong class="my-custom-class">Find an AI assistant</strong></h3><p>Do not do everything by yourself. Here are some great AI assistants:</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://sider.ai/download">https://sider.ai/download</a></strong></p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://monica.im/">https://monica.im</a></strong></p></li></ul><p>If you encounter any programming problems, try asking your AI assistant first.</p><h3 id="heading-4"><strong class="my-custom-class">Say Hello to the Terminal App</strong></h3><p>Every macOS user has a Terminal app. It is the most powerful tool in our arsenal.</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Print the current directory:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;pwd&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="268e46d9-b757-45ab-bd42-fa14dc86d8e0"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>List all files in the current directory:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;ls&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="df7dcdbc-0e0a-42c5-9827-b7c0a5f79777"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Change the current directory:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;cd ~/Desktop&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="80b206fc-cb35-4b4b-b0ae-2dcfe0c47674"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Create a new directory:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;mkdir new_directory&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="9706358f-9702-40e8-b386-73e5be609b9a"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Create a new file:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;touch new_file.txt&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="4c9f3f25-b046-4cd6-9bfb-df36abbe9449"></pre><p>You can also use the following command to create a new file:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="80e91df6-8649-4408-8e5e-cd53d787820c"></pre><p>The above command will create a new file named <code class="my-custom-class">new_file.txt</code> and write the text "Hello, World!" in it.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Delete a file:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;rm new_file.txt&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="33901034-6a61-4538-abbb-f9d84e927c45"></pre></li></ul><h3 id="heading-5"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Homebrew</strong></h3><p>What is Homebrew?</p><blockquote class="my-custom-class"><p>Homebrew is a package manager for macOS (or Linux), which simplifies the installation of software like Git, Node.js, Python, and Ruby.</p></blockquote><p>Simply put, it helps us install and manage software.</p><p>Please refer to <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://brew.sh/">https://brew.sh</a></strong> for more information.</p><h3 id="heading-6"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install GIT</strong></h3><p>What is GIT?</p><blockquote class="my-custom-class"><p>Git is a distributed version control system for tracking changes in source code during software development.</p></blockquote><p>Simply put, it helps us manage code.</p><p>You can use the following command to install GIT:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;brew install git&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="e592415f-d81b-4cb2-a4e3-649761287040"></pre><p>After installation is complete, enter this code in the terminal app and hit enter to run.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;git --version&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="939e40ff-d99a-4673-93f1-8209b333d779"></pre><p>If you see the following output, congratulations! You have successfully installed GIT.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;git version 2.34.0&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="b2577f5b-5687-43f1-b872-1472aff3b66d"></pre><h3 id="heading-7"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install GitHub Desktop</strong></h3><p>What is GitHub Desktop?</p><blockquote class="my-custom-class"><p>GitHub Desktop is a free and open-source graphical user interface for Git. It provides a visual representation of the workflow that occurs when using Git, including a timeline of commits, branches, and files</p></blockquote><p>Simply put, it helps us manage code.</p><p>Please refer to <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://desktop.github.com/">https://desktop.github.com</a></strong> for more information.</p><p>After installation is complete, try to open this project with GitHub Desktop with the following steps:</p><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="" title=""><p></p><h3 id="heading-8"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Visual Studio Code</strong></h3><p>What is Visual Studio Code?</p><p>Simply put, it helps us write code.</p><p>Please refer to <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/">https://code.visualstudio.com</a></strong> for more information.</p><p>After installation is complete, try to open this project with Visual Studio Code with the following steps:</p><p></p><p>Now, you can see all the code of this project.</p><h3 id="heading-9"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Node.js</strong></h3><p>A very useful software that many projects require, just install it!</p><p>You can use the following command to install Node.js:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;brew install node&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="e9618f61-2767-40f3-926a-353fc9563555"></pre><p>After installation is complete, enter this code in the terminal app and hit enter to run.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;node -v&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="7b775d80-bd1d-482b-83b4-11873cd28c1d"></pre><p>If you see the following output, congratulations! You have successfully installed Node.js.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;v17.3.0&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="4376ce88-4bff-41de-94a6-9d9a0d97b3d7"></pre><h3 id="heading-10"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install PHP</strong></h3><p>We use PHP as the main programming language for developing websites.</p><p>You can use the following command to install PHP:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;brew install php&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="35a8fe95-66dd-48da-b5c7-9fa76d982058"></pre><p>After installation is complete, enter this code in the terminal app and hit enter to run.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;php -v&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="988a5a64-0478-4cef-a5d8-86aafdeab74e"></pre><p>If you see the following output, congratulations! You have successfully installed PHP.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="89bdb06a-c67a-460c-89c7-455bff8bf0f8"></pre><h2 id="heading-11"><strong class="my-custom-class">Submit a pull request</strong></h2><h3 id="heading-12"><strong class="my-custom-class">What is a pull request?</strong></h3><p>A pull request is a way to suggest changes to someone else's project.</p><p>This project is not yours, but if you want to submit some code, please initiate a pull request.</p><h3 id="heading-13"><strong class="my-custom-class">How to submit a pull request?</strong></h3><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Fork this project to your own GitHub account.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Clone this project to your local computer.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Create a new branch called "playground{random number}".</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Create a new file called "playground.md".</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Commit your code to the new branch.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Push the new branch to your GitHub account.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Click the "New pull request" button on your GitHub account and select the new branch you just pushed to create a pull request.</p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-14"><strong class="my-custom-class">Say Hello to PHP</strong></h2><h3 id="heading-15"><strong class="my-custom-class">Print the time</strong></h3><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Open this project with Visual Studio Code</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Open the terminal app by pressing <code class="my-custom-class">Ctrl + ~</code></p></li></ul><p>Follow the steps below to print the time.</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Create a new file called <code class="my-custom-class">time.php</code> in the <code class="my-custom-class">docs/php</code> directory of this project.</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Write the following code in the file:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">php</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="24dd4d86-a933-4ed6-a070-6626317ea62c"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Enter this code within the terminal app and hit enter to run:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;php time.php&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="c2bcfc6a-d85a-45a8-931b-affb6361cb30"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>If you see the following output, congratulations! You have successfully printed the time.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;2021-12-31 16:45:09&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="f7fbd2c8-e0a2-4aa3-a71f-bf0de36d0b75"></pre></li></ul><p>Now, you have learned how to write a PHP file and run it.</p><h3 id="heading-16"><strong class="my-custom-class">Function</strong></h3><p>Create a new file called <code class="my-custom-class">function.php</code> in the <code class="my-custom-class">docs/php</code> directory of this project.</p><p>Write a function to print the Fibonacci sequence. Fill in the missing code.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">php</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="e808b87b-97bc-442d-b276-a1cbc068cb9b"></pre><h3 id="heading-17"><strong class="my-custom-class">Array Sorting</strong></h3><p>Create a new file called <code class="my-custom-class">array_sorting.php</code> in the <code class="my-custom-class">docs/php</code> directory of this project.</p><p>Here is a function that takes two arrays and merges them into one and sort in ascending order. Fill in the missing code.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">php</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="96140d3b-12a2-407c-a741-28dccc74c74c"></pre><p>The array <code class="my-custom-class">c</code> should be: <code class="my-custom-class">[1,2,3,4,5]</code>.</p><h3 id="heading-18"><strong class="my-custom-class">HTTP Server</strong></h3><p>Create a new file called <code class="my-custom-class">http_server.php</code> in the <code class="my-custom-class">docs/php</code> directory of this project. Create a HTTP server that listens on port 8000 with this shell command:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;php -S localhost:8000 http_server.php&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="8150581a-006e-4ecc-90e8-8e350fb2ee5d"></pre><p>When the user accesses the homepage, print "Hello World!".</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">php</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="34b9e221-620d-4cd1-a427-8f02dd02ca26"></pre><p>This is the basic principle of developing web pages.</p><h2 id="heading-19"><strong class="my-custom-class">Magical algorithm</strong></h2><p>How to merge two arrays? How to sort the elements of an array?</p><p>The ideas that come to your mind are called algorithms, and they are the soul of a program. If you have more interest in algorithms, please continue to learn more about them.</p><h3 id="heading-20"><strong class="my-custom-class">Reference</strong></h3><p>If you want to learn more, the following are some references.</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>《算法图解》</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>《大话数据结构》</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://leetcode.cn/">https://leetcode.cn</a></strong></p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-21"><strong class="my-custom-class">Say Hello to Laravel</strong></h2><p>What is Laravel?</p><p>Laravel is a PHP framework. It provides many useful tools to help you build web applications quickly and easily.</p><h3 id="heading-22"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Composer</strong></h3><p>Composer is a package manager for PHP. It helps you install and update the dependencies of your project.</p><p>Open this page <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://getcomposer.org/download/">https://getcomposer.org/download/</a></strong> and follow the steps to install Composer.</p><h3 id="heading-23"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Laravel</strong></h3><p>Follow the steps below to install Laravel and run it.</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Make sure current directory is the root of this project, run the following code in the terminal app:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;pwd&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="1d0b2acc-4a0a-4fcf-b64c-1a3e3f8152ea"></pre><p>The output should be:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;.../APIStore&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="2ed89491-504d-40ac-93bd-7d89200509a9"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Install Laravel by running the following code in the terminal app:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;composer create-project laravel/laravel store-app&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;JavaScript&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="5bfebee1-b811-48ed-abd9-51101400b7da"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Now you have a directory named <code class="my-custom-class">store-app</code> in the current directory.</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="50bdadc0-6b2f-4e33-9392-4fa9a93a1d94"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Enter the following code in the terminal app to run Laravel:</p><p><strong class="my-custom-class">bash</strong></p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;自动生成的代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Bash&quot;,&quot;runVisible&quot;:true}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="a5be095f-0d03-42ad-852c-d34a6ba65194"></pre></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Open your browser and enter the following URL: <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="http://127.0.0.1:8000/">http://127.0.0.1:8000</a></strong> to see the Laravel homepage.</p></li></ul><h3 id="heading-24"><strong class="my-custom-class">References</strong></h3><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://laravel.com/">https://laravel.com</a></strong></p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://learnku.com/docs/laravel/10.x">https://learnku.com/docs/laravel/10.x</a></strong></p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-25"><strong class="my-custom-class">Build a web application with Laravel</strong></h2><p>It's time to build something amazing with Laravel.</p><p>Now modify the code in <code class="my-custom-class">store-app</code> directory to build a web application as shown in the following image.</p><p></p><p>🔔 If you have no idea about how to start, learn the following courses first:</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://www.imooc.com/u/3781805">https://www.imooc.com/u/3781805</a></strong></p></li></ul><h3 id="heading-26"><strong class="my-custom-class">TailwindCSS</strong></h3><p>TailwindCSS is a utility-first CSS framework.</p><p>Follow this link to make tailwindcss work with Laravel: <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://tailwindcss.com/docs/guides/laravel">https://tailwindcss.com/docs/guides/laravel</a></strong></p><p>After that, you need to learn how to build beautiful web pages with tailwindcss and Laravel. Just practice within the store-app project.</p><h4 id="heading-27"><strong class="my-custom-class">References</strong></h4><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p><strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://tailwindcss.com/">https://tailwindcss.com</a></strong></p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-28"><strong class="my-custom-class">Say Hello to Linux</strong></h2><p>Linux is a free and open-source operating system which is widely used on servers.</p><p></p><h3 id="heading-29"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install Ubuntu</strong></h3><p>Ubuntu is a free and open-source operating system. It is based on Debian Linux.</p><p><code class="my-custom-class">OrbStack</code> is a software that can help you install Ubuntu on your macOS. Install the software and then install Ubuntu on your computer.</p><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>download and install OrbStack: <strong class="my-custom-class"><a href="https://orbstack.dev/">https://orbstack.dev</a></strong></p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>install Ubuntu within the OrbStack App</p></li></ul><p></p><h3 id="heading-30"><strong class="my-custom-class">Install applications within Ubuntu</strong></h3><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>install PHP</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p>install Composer</p></li></ul><h4 id="heading-31"><strong class="my-custom-class">References</strong></h4><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>《鸟哥的 Linux 私房菜》</p></li></ul><h2 id="heading-32"><strong class="my-custom-class">What is API</strong></h2><p></p><h2 id="heading-33"><strong class="my-custom-class">What is HTTP</strong></h2><p></p><p>Pager</p><p><a href="https://cofficlab.github.io/zh/coffic/softwares.html"></a></p><toc></toc>
